chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3610 - وَ قَالَ رَجُلٌ لِأَبِي اَلْحَسَنِ مُوسَى بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ عِدْنِي قَالَ "كَيْفَ أَعِدُكَ وَ أَنَا لِمَا لاَ أَرْجُو أَرْجَى مِنِّي لِمَا أَرْجُو".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3610 - A man said to Abu al-Hasan Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as):
"Promise me something."
Imam (as) replied: "How can I promise you, when I have more hope in what I do not expect than in what I do expect?"
